companyNameJapanese: 三菱ケミカルグループ株式会社
description: Japan's largest chemical company (formed 2023 from merger of Mitsubishi Chemical, Kureha spun-off assets, and listed entity restructuring). Operates through subsidiaries: Mitsubishi Chemical (specialty chemicals, MMA/PMMA, functional polymers), Mitsubishi Engineering-Plastics (MEP — Novarex PC, Iupilon PC, Reny PA, Xyron PPE/PA, Tribit PBT), Mitsubishi Gas Chemical, and others. Via MEP, supplies engineering plastics (polycarbonate, polyamide, PPE/PA, PBT) to Nagase Plastics Co. for distribution. Also produces semiconductor materials including high-purity chemicals, photomask blanks (via synthetic quartz), and specialty films.

_externalRelationships.nagaseRelationship: Via subsidiary Mitsubishi Engineering-Plastics (MEP), confirmed supplier to Nagase Plastics Co., Ltd. for distribution of polycarbonate, polyamide, and other engineering plastics.
keyProducts: Iupilon / Novarex PC (polycarbonate) — optical, electronics, automotive
Semiconductor materials — specialty chemicals for semiconductor processing

_metadata.dataSource: Nagase Plastics supplier page confirming Mitsubishi Engineering-Plastics as supplier, Mitsubishi Chemical Group IR
_metadata.notes: Added as Nagase (CMP-0058) key supplier via MEP subsidiary. Financial data not included pending dedicated deep research.
